channel.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Apr 12th, 2021
item.description:
Packages

Apps

  • EarSketch - free educational programming environment to teach Python and Javascript through music composing and remixing

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Jun 30th, 2020
item.description:
Resources

Tutorials

  • Browser Noise: Web Audio Tutorials - Playlist of video tutorials by Dan Tramte, hosted on the Audio Programmer YouTube channel.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Jun 24th, 2020
item.description:
Packages

Libraries

  • soundfont-player - A soundfont loader/player to play MIDI sounds using WebAudio API.

    • Packages

    Apps

  • Web Audio Metronomestars412 - metronome app that uses the Web Audio scheduler and setTimeout scheduler

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Jun 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Packages

Libraries

  • @magenta/music - A JavaScript library to use machine learning models and generate music in the browser, by having some neat abstractions over the Webaudio API.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Jun 17th, 2020
item.description:
Packages

Apps

  • X Sound - Multi Sound Application that uses XSound.js.

    • Packages

    Libraries

  • XSound.js - Full stack library.
  • p5.sound - An extension that adds Web Audio functionality to the creative coding library p5.js.

    • Resources

    Books

  • JavaScript for Sound Artists - A bottom up JavaScript / DOM course using Web Audio for all the examples.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Jun 16th, 2020
item.description:
Packages

Frameworks

  • Omnitonestars722 - Ambisonic spatial audio on the web.
  • Mach1Spatialstars23 - Vector based panning spatial audio on the web.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Jun 6th, 2020
item.description:
Packages

Apps

  • jamhubstars17 - low-latency remote music collaboration & jam.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Jun 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Packages

Apps

  • AudioMass - free, open source, web-based Audio and Waveform Editor.
  • Csound IDE - web IDE for CSound programming language.

    • Obsolete

  • Web Audio Modules - synthesizers and audio effects processors for web browsers (both API and implementations).

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Dec 7th, 2019
item.description:
Packages

Frameworks

  • Bapstars102 - A toolkit for making beats and composing sequences, inspired by the classic MPC60/2000.

    • Packages

    Libraries

  • Sound.jsstars238 - A micro-library to load, play and generate sound effects and music for games and interactive applications.
  • Circular Audio Wavestars137 - A JS library for audio visualization in circular wave using Web Audio API and ECharts.
  • Wadstars1.4k - Web Audio DAW. Use the Web Audio API for dynamic sound synthesis. It's like jQuery for your ears.

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • WebAudio Schoolstars373 - A series of self-guided workshops to learn WebAudio.

    • Obsolete

  • Gibberishstars349 - A JavaScript DSP library that creates JIT optimized audio callbacks using code generation techniques.
  • lissajousstars371 - A tool for programmatic audio performance.
  • SSSynthesiser.jsstars47 - A wavetable synthesizer for interactive music and sound effects.
  • WAAXstars308 - Build Music Apps for browsers.
  • Band.jsstars1.1k An interface for the Web Audio API that supports rhythms, multiple instruments, repeating sections, and complex time signatures.
  • reverbGenstars41 - A JavaScript library for generating artificial reverb impulse responses.
  • TuneJSstars154 - A tuning library of microtonal and just intonation scales. Supports over 3,000 historical tunings.
  • Beet.jsstars87 - A sequencer library for creating euclidean rhythms and polyrhythms.
  • AudioKeysstars200 - A QWERTY keyboard for web audio projects.
  • web-audio-test-apistars65 - A Web Audio test library for CI.
  • javascript-karplus-strongstars247 - JavaScript/Web Audio implementation of Karplus-Strong guitar synthesis.
  • osc-msgstars17 - OSC message decoder/encoder with fault tolerance.
  • Pizzicatostars1.3k - A library that aims to simplify the creation and manipulation sounds in the browser.
  • Mooogstars26 - Tools that simplify working with AudioNodes, inspired by jQuery and mixing tables.
  • envelope-generatorstars30 - Simple ADSR envelope generator for web audio.
  • audio contourstars19 - A 5 stage audio envelope generator.
  • web-audio-recorder-jsstars617 - A library that records audio input (Web Audio API AudioNode object) and encodes to audio file image (Blob object).
  • audioletstars883 - A JavaScript library for real-time audio synthesis and composition from within the browser.
  • playnotestars2 - Play your favorite instrument in the browser, with complex note intervals and scales.
  • Recorderjsstars3.7k - A plugin for recording/exporting the output of Web Audio API nodes.
  • resamplerstars35 - A utility for resampling audio.
  • bpm-detectivestars88 – Detects the BPM of a song or audio sample.
  • web-audio-utilsstars10 - Commonly needed utility functions for Web Audio API.
  • web-audio-oscillatorsstars37 - A collection of Web Audio custom oscillators.
  • midi-portsstars14 - handy library to make it easier to work with attached MIDI devices.
  • Midi Logger - This Midi Logger will print all midi input to your browser for debugging.
  • Code Playerstars20 - An experimental app that makes your codes sing for you.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Jun 1st, 2019
item.description:
Packages

Utilities

  • web-audio-generatorstars53 - A UI for generating Web Audio code.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Apr 14th, 2019
item.description:
Packages

Apps

  • BassoonTrackerstars705 - MOD/XM Tracker in Javascript.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Jul 21st, 2018
item.description:
Resources

Newsletters

  • Web Audio Weekly Newsletter - A weekly review of what's happening in Web Audio.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Jul 20th, 2018
item.description:
Packages

Apps

  • DSP.audio Worklet Editor - Online Audio Worklet editor for sketching and collaboration, with sampler, MIDI and analyzers. Like a JSFiddle, but for DSP.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Jul 13th, 2018
item.description:
Resources

Books

  • Web Audio API - Intended to be a springboard for web developers with little to no digital audio expertise. Geared towards game audio and interactive apps.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Jul 7th, 2018
item.description:
Packages

Libraries

  • Howler.jsstars18.4k - A comprehensive library with a fallback to HTML5 Audio.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Apr 10th, 2018
item.description:
Resources

Tutorials

  • Web Audio API Understandable Reference - A reference that aims to be easy to understand for those who know some JavaScript and basic audio principles.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Mar 12th, 2018
item.description:
Packages

Apps

  • SoundCyclestars38 - A Web Audio based Loopstation for musicians with effects and different looping modes.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Feb 24th, 2018
item.description:
Packages

Apps

  • waveform-playliststars964 - Multitrack Web Audio editor and player with canvas waveform preview. Set cues, fades and shift multiple tracks in time. Record audio tracks or provide audio annotations. Export your mix to AudioBuffer or WAV! Project inspired by Audacity.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Feb 10th, 2018
item.description:
Packages

Apps

  • AudioNodes - Modular audio production suite with multi-track audio mixing, audio effects, parameter automation, MIDI editing, synthesis, cloud production, and more.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Feb 2nd, 2018
item.description:
Packages

MIDI

  • JZZstars339 - MIDI library for Node.js and all major browsers.
  • JZZ-midi-Gearstars9 - Retrieve your MIDI device model and manufacturer.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Dec 8th, 2017
item.description:
Packages

Libraries

  • Rythm.js - A javascript library that makes your page dance.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Oct 4th, 2017
item.description:
Packages

Apps

  • Super Oscillatorstars28 - An interactive, 3D music synthesizer for the Web.
  • mod-synth.iostars47 - Create your own modular synthesizer, or emulate different synths.

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • Web Audio Perf - Performance of various AudioNodes and strategies for efficient resource usage (from WAC2016).

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio May 10th, 2017
item.description:
Packages

Apps

  • Learning Music - Learn the basics of music making.

    • Packages

    Libraries

  • Meydastars808 - Audio feature extraction library including a variety of widely used audio features.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Apr 4th, 2017
item.description:
Packages

Utilities

  • Audionstars240 - Chrome extension that adds a Web Audio panel to Developer Tools.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Nov 24th, 2016
item.description:
Packages

Apps

  • GridSound - A work-in-progress DAW (Digital Audio Workstation).

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Oct 4th, 2016
item.description:
Resources

Tutorials

  • The Web Audio API: What Is It? - Intro to WebAudio.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Sep 21st, 2016
item.description:
Packages

Libraries

  • Tunastars1.4k - An audio effects library.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Jul 6th, 2016
item.description:
Packages

Libraries

  • Audiojsstars234 - An object that enables you to store, read, and write PCM audio data more easily.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Apr 6th, 2016
item.description:
Resources

Tutorials

  • Percussion Synthesis Using Web Audiostars32 - This tutorial will introduce the basics of web audio programming by writing code to synthesize simple percussion sounds (from WAC2016).

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Mar 21st, 2016
item.description:
Packages

Libraries

  • Wavesurfer.jsstars5.2k - Interactive navigable audio visualization using Web Audio and Canvas.

Community

  • Slack - A Slack for discussing Web Audio.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Jan 19th, 2016
item.description:
Packages

Apps

  • Molgavstars2 - Musical Step Sequencer for melodies exchange.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Oct 4th, 2015
item.description:
Packages

Libraries

  • virtual-audio-graphstars300 - Library for declaratively manipulating the Web Audio API.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Sep 28th, 2015
item.description:
Resources

Tutorials

  • Web Audio Basicsstars106 - A growing set of light code samples with CodePen links for each.

    • Packages

    Libraries

  • smoothfadestars29 - A library for smoothly fading between two AudioNodes.

item.title: notthetup/awesome-webaudio Sep 25th, 2015
item.description:
Packages

Frameworks

  • Tone.jsstars10.9k - A framework for making interactive music in the browser.

    • Packages

    MIDI

  • midimessagestars24 - A simple MIDI Message parser.

    • Packages

    Apps

  • LoopDrop Appstars789 - MIDI looper, modular synth and sampler app built using Web Audio and Web MIDI APIs.
